Host-wrapped select root exposed through the public interface SDK.

# Import

```ts
import { Select } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui";
```

# Accepted Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | Controlled selected value. |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | Uncontrolled selected value. |
| `onValueChange` | `function` | Selection handler. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | Disable interaction. |

# Source

- Public host component exposed through `@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui`.
